description: Returns entity's weapons information including weapon index and firemode.
name: weaponsInfo

ArraySized.desc: internal weapon index (changes frequently) used with "SwitchWeapon" and "UseWeapon" [[action]]s
ArraySized.name: weaponIndex

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if this weapon is currently selected
ArraySized.name: isSelected

ArraySized.desc: firemode that is set for this 'weaponIndex'
ArraySized.name: firemode

ArraySized.desc: name of the loaded magazine or ""
ArraySized.name: magazineName

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if this muzzle is considered primary by the engine (Since Arma 3 2.14)
ArraySized.name: isPrimary

Item.desc: name of the weapon or muzzle (returns whichever matches first) or "" to return all weapons
Item.name: weaponOrMuzzle

Item.desc: (Optional, default [[false]]) [[true]] to return loaded weapons only
Item.name: onlyLoaded
